---
title: "Model_EDA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Spatial Temporal SVR result analysis

## Result for first 3 area

```{r}
test_results_all
```

```{r}
top_msoa <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(accident_count)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:3) %>%
  pull(.data[[cscale]])

plot_subset <- test_results_all %>%
  filter(.data[[cscale]] %in% top_msoa)

ggplot(plot_subset, aes(x = time_date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = accident_count, group = .data[[cscale]], color = .data[[cscale]]), size = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Predicted_stsvr, group = .data[[cscale]], color = .data[[cscale]]), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~.data[[cscale]], scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Map

```{r}
library(tmap)
source('../utils/map_func.R')
spatial_error <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()

tmap_mode('plot')
error_map <- tm_basemap("CartoDB.Positron") +
  tm_shape(spatial_error) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    # fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(
    #   values = "RdBu",
    #   midpoint = 0,
    #   style = "fixed",
    #   breaks = c(-Inf, -10, -5, -2, 2, 5, 10, Inf)),
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual (Actual - Predicted)")) +
  add_map_decorations()

error_map
# tmap_save(error_map, filename = paste0("Data/Layout/residual_map_",cscale,".png", sep=''), width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

# Compare All models

```{r}
aggregate_all_models <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(time_date) %>%
  summarise(
    actual_sum = sum(accident_count),
    mse_tsvr_mean = mean(mse_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_tsvr = sum(Predicted_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_stsvr_mean = mean(mse_stsvr, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_stsvr = sum(Predicted_stsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_starima_mean = mean(mse_starima, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_starima = sum(Predicted_starima, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_arima_mean = mean(mse_arima, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_arima = sum(Predicted_arima, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_stgcn_mean = mean(mse_stgcn, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_stgcn = sum(Predicted_stgcn, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_ann_mean = mean(mse_ann, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_ann = sum(Predicted_ann, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_gcn_lstm_mean = mean(mse_gcn_lstm, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_gcn_lstm = sum(Predicted_gcn_lstm, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
compare_plot <- aggregate_all_models %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Predicted"),
    names_to = "Model",
    values_to = "Predicted") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x=time_date, y=actual_sum, color="Actual"), size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(x=time_date, y=Predicted, color=Model), size=1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Type",
                     values = c("Actual" = "#1e23b3", 
                                "Predicted_stsvr" = "#63e0ff", "Predicted_tsvr" = "#25b7db",
                                "Predicted_starima" = "#2fad6e", "Predicted_arima" = "#1a633f",
                                "Predicted_ann" = "#d465d6", "Predicted_stgcn" = "#9b819c",
                                "Predicted_gcn_lstm" = "#ff7f00")) +
  labs(title="Model Prediction", y="Accidents") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

compare_plot
ggsave(file = "../Data/Layout/time_based_two_model_compare.png", compare_plot, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
avg_mse_svr <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_stsvr_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)
avg_mse_tsvr <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_tsvr_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)
avg_mse_starima <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_starima_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)
avg_mse_arima <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_arima_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)
avg_mse_stgcn <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_stgcn_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 510)
avg_mse_ann <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_ann_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)
avg_mse_lstmgcn <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_gcn_lstm_mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 10)

# create table for MSE
tb <- tibble(
  Model = c("STSVR", "TSVR", "STARIMA", "ARIMA", "ANN", "TGCN", "GCN+LSTM"),
  MSE = c(avg_mse_svr, avg_mse_tsvr, avg_mse_starima, avg_mse_arima, avg_mse_stgcn, avg_mse_ann, avg_mse_lstmgcn),
)
tb
```
